candidate_definition_hints.text: PromptInject is a framework that assembles prompts in a modular fashion to provide a quantitative analysis of the robustness of LLMs to adversarial prompt attacks. 🏆 Best Paper Awards @ NeurIPS ML Safety Workshop 2022
[**Paper: Ignore Previous Prompt: Attack Techniques For Language Models**](https://arxiv.org/abs/2211.09527)
